song.title: Do Not Hide Your Face Lord
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Do not hide Your face From me, Lord. Strengthen me to walk aright; Constantly appear to me, Lord, Till my journey is complete.|| Your radiant face, my only guide— I can be bold and without fear; May Your countenance of glory Shine upon me with Your light.
[V2] 2) Every step has no assurance, Thorns and thistles all around; Each decision is uncertain, Lord, I know not where You hide.|| Lord, by Your presence intimate, I boldly press toward the goal, Thus, Lord, may Your precious presence Stay with me continually.
[V3] 3) When I seek Your best, Lord Jesus, Evil self is evident; When Your will is my intention, I am ever powerless.|| ’Tis only by Your glorious self, That I can lose myself in You; Thus, Lord, may Your glory always, Draw me from the earth away.
[V4] 4) Lord, do grant me one intention: Just to gain Yourself alone. This is now my aspiration: Not to grieve Your heart again.|| Lord, it is You I now beseech, Embrace me tightly in Your breast; May Your sweet and loving Person Ever be my strength and rest.
song.author: Titus Chu
